highlights.text: I specified this back on Friday at 4pm, when we were 6020, by stating: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend, until it ends.
My lean is we work back up to 6050, then 6081.
I wrote yesterday: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
That footprint is my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “…Wait for a Failed Breakdown of Thursdays 5970 low.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a very deep dive into that Sunday 6pm Failed Breakdown, because it produced a 180+ point move.
